description: A new tenant has been approved for a rental. The agent must generate the lease agreement for them to sign.

nodes.task_description: Gather all necessary information: tenant names, property address, lease start/end dates, rent amount, and security deposit amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all required data for the lease.

nodes.task_description: Select the correct state-specific lease template and populate it with the gathered information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a legally compliant and accurate lease document.

nodes.task_description: Send the completed lease agreement to the new tenant for their review and signature.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the lease for e-signature.
